creator: steve.polyack@intermedix.com
text:
Created attachment 148775
Patch to update maintainer and USE_GITHUB

Attached is a patch to update the sysutils/jailme port in order to move its distfiles away from people.collaborativefusion.com and over to Intermedix's corporate Github.

Collaborative Fusion was acquired by Intermedix (see http://www.collaborativefusion.com), and we are moving any ports we maintain over to a standard internal distribution list (freebsd-ports-maintainers@intermedix.com).

William Moran (current listed maintainer) is also no longer with the company.
